Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sky's Edge]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Sky's Edge is the location where the Akura expedition is arriving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Sky's Edge is a location Charity must visit periodically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Sky's Edge is a location of powerful ice aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Sky’s Edge is a location where Lindon stayed for his first night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura cloudship approached Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Sky’s Edge is a land with very strong earth aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon will return to Sky’s Edge after the next tournament round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Abyssal Palace moved over Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Sky's Edge is the location where Abyssal Palace hovers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — A flight of dragons is poised to cross the continent toward Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Sky's Edge is a place where people face dragons on the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Sky's Edge is a location with prizes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Sky's Edge is a location that Aunt Charity cannot transport people to on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Sky’s Edge is a destination for the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Sky's Edge is a location being approached by the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Sky’s Edge contains a fortress raised by the Seishen king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Fury and others are pinned in Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Sky's Edge is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — A stone hand is visible above the ruined homes of Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sky’s Edge is a fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sky’s Edge is a location where Xorrus gave a sigh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sky's Edge is a location located a few miles away from where an Icon was manifested.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Crates taken from Sky’s Edge contained items from a mine or from enemies.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Sky's Edge is a location where Sophara fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon contributed to the cause during the fight for Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Sky’s Edge is a location reached via a portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Sky's Edge is a gate that Charity expanded into a broad screen of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Sky's Edge is a seaside town that was destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Wandering Titan took a stride that crossed the space where Sky’s Edge once stood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wandering Titan was seen sleeping in the bay outside Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Wandering Titan marched eastward from Sky's Edge.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Sky's Edge is a location Yan Shoumei escaped from.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
